channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Danish intelligence test may underestimate bilingual young people's abilities
item.description: Psychologists in Denmark often use the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale (WAIS) for intelligence testing. The test is used in everyth...

item.title: Thrifty food plan costs vary widely across US regions and cities
item.description: A study in the Journal of Nutrition Education and Behavior examined how the cost of the USDA's Thrifty Food Plan (TFP), which serves as the bas...

item.title: One in four teen girls and young women at risk for PMOS
item.description: Findings suggest young females should be assessed and, if at risk, monitored. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Sugar-free diets may disrupt the gut microbiome, animal study indicates
item.description: Eliminating sugar from your diet may be more harmful than previously thought, according to an animal study presented at ENDO 2026, the Endocrine S...
